creator: admin@mydevil.net
text:
Created attachment 167484
Patch for devel/ioncube port

Update devel/ioncube to 5.0.21.
On http://www.ioncube.com/loaders.php version is 5.0.23 but after install it shows: with the ionCube PHP Loader v5.0.21, Copyright (c) 2002-2016, by ionCube Ltd.
Tar.bz2 packages are not more available so I changed it to tar.gz format.
